mapper.select: SELECT 'evaluationReport' AS title ,'/EvaluationReport' AS route ,'evaluationReportDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN evaluationReport.exist then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report taco ON tai.target_type = 'ER' AND tai.param = 'approver' --AND tai.target_id = taco.write_year || taco.doc_no WHERE taco.comp_id = #{compId} AND taco.write_year = #{searchText} ) AS exist ) AS evaluationReport UNION ALL SELECT 'performanceEvaluationTable' AS title ,'/PerformanceEvaluationTable' AS route ,'performanceEvaluationTableDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN performanceEvaluationTable.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report taco on tai.target_type = 'ERP' --AND tai.param = 'approver' --AND tai.target_id = taco.write_year || taco.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail tao ON taco.write_year = tao.write_year AND taco.doc_no = taco.doc_no AND taco.doc_type = taco.doc_type WHERE taco.comp_id = #{compId} AND taco.write_year = #{searchText} ) AS exist ) AS performanceEvaluationTable UNION ALL SELECT 'complianceEvaluationTable' AS title ,'/ComplianceEvaluationTable' AS route ,'complianceEvaluationTableDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN complianceEvaluationTable.exist then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation taco ON tai.target_type = 'LCE' AND tai.param = 'approver' WHERE taco.comp_id = #{compId} AND taco.write_year = #{searchText} -- AND tai.target_id = taco.write_year || taco.doc_no ) AS exist ) AS complianceEvaluationTable UNION ALL SELECT 'evaluationCorrectiveActionRequest' AS title ,'/EvaluationCorrectiveActionRequest' AS route ,'evaluationCorrectiveActionRequestDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN evaluationCorrectiveActionRequest.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as activeYn from ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request a WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.doc_type = 'CAR' AND a.car_type = 'E' AND a.write_year = #{searchText} ) AS exist ) AS evaluationCorrectiveActionRequest
